title: ROST or COST: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors interested in Retail - Discount Stores stocks are likely familiar with Ross Stores (ROST) and Costco (COST). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: Ross Stores Fashioning Growth: Analysts See Double-Digit EPS Rise
text: Ross Stores Inc. NASDAQ: ROST is trading higher for the week, following news that the company is opening new locations at a fast pace and is on track to add about 100 new stores during fiscal 2023.

title: Here's Why Ross Stores (ROST) is a Strong Value Stock
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: 4 Retail Discount Stocks Thriving Amid Industry Challenges
text: Consumer spending activity, which is one of the pivotal factors driving the economy, has somewhat slowed down.

title: 4 Retail Discount Stocks Thriving Amid Industry Challenges
text: Better pricing, effective inventory management and operational initiatives are likely to drive Retail - Discount Stores companies. Costco (COST), The TJX Companies (TJX), Target (TGT) and Ross Stores (ROST) look well-placed.

title: Off-Price Retailers TJX, Ross, and Burlington Have a Different Path to Profits
text: TJ Maxx owner TJX, Ross Stores, and Burlington Stores have low gross margins, and spend almost nothing on marketing. That could be a recipe for success.

title: Ross Stores (ROST) Expands Footprint, Unveils 27 New Locations
text: Ross Stores (ROST) strengthens brand visibility, captures new customers and unlocks potential sales growth by expanding its store network.

title: ROSS STORES OPENS 27 NEW LOCATIONS
text: PLANNING APPROXIMATELY 100 NEW STORES IN 2023 DUBLIN, Calif. , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Ross Stores recently opened 18 Ross Dress for Less® ("Ross") and nine dd's DISCOUNTS® stores across 14 different states in June and July.

title: Here's Why Ross Stores (ROST) is Marching Ahead of the Industry
text: Ross Stores (ROST) seems well poised for further growth on the back of strong value offerings, store expansion efforts and improved merchandise, despite cost headwinds.

title: Ross Stores: Business Fundamentals Should Continue To Stay Strong
text: Despite facing challenges such as inflation and weather disruptions, Ross Stores has shown resilience with a 1% increase in same-store sales in Q1 2023. I expect ROST to benefit from the current macroeconomic environment, with its focus on value for low to moderate-income consumers and potential for improved gross margins. Although a cautious outlook is advised due to the ongoing weak macro situation, the company could exceed current estimates and restore margins to pre-recession levels.
